findings.title: POST /bff/session/set-org did not 403 on non-member org
findings.resolution: MembershipRepository.findByUserAndOrg() called BEFORE refreshSession(); null → 403 FORBIDDEN. Live-proven in DELTA-R1 and regression-confirmed in DELTA-R2: non-member UUID → HTTP 403 FORBIDDEN.

findings.escalation_reason: Bounce-fix r2 introduced parameterized SET LOCAL $1 (invalid Postgres syntax, 42601). Bounced at DELTA-R1.
findings.title: rotateRefreshToken family-wipe: SET LOCAL $1 replaced with set_config()
findings.resolution: rawClient.query("SELECT set_config('app.current_user_id', $1, true)", [row.app_user_id]) at line 411. LIVE-PROVEN: replay RT1 (after RT0→RT1→RT2 rotation) → HTTP 401 SESSION_REVOKED (not 500). DB: 3/3 sessions revoked (rowcount>1). LIVE-PG-1/2/3 tests all pass against real Postgres under SET ROLE brain_app. Unit test non-inert: asserts set_config string present before family-wipe SQL; fails if removed. Grep confirms zero remaining parameterized SET LOCAL in apps/core/src.

findings.title: /bff/session rate limiter double-counts loginFailKey — effective limit 2 not 5
findings.resolution: loginFailKey moved to catch-only (line 201); loginIpKey at entry only (line 144); both reset on success (lines 165-166). LIVE-PROVEN: 4 failed attempts → correct password → HTTP 200. Trips at 5 failures (429 on 6th attempt). Mirrors auth.routes.ts pattern exactly.

findings.title: PATCH/DELETE /members used inverted org fallback
findings.resolution: RESOLVED in DELTA-R1. Code verified DELTA-R2: mismatch guard present on both routes.

findings.title: Misleading CSRF-exempt comment on set-org route
findings.resolution: RESOLVED in DELTA-R1. Comment corrected: CSRF IS enforced. Verified DELTA-R2.

findings.title: DOWN migrations absent; rollback path undocumented
findings.resolution: RESOLVED in DELTA-R1. MANUAL ROLLBACK PROCEDURE blocks added to all three migration files.

findings.title: MA-01: Refresh token rotation (was absent in FULL review)
findings.resolution: RESOLVED FULL review. Replay path confirmed DELTA-R2 LIVE: RT0→RT1→RT2→replay-RT1 → 401 SESSION_REVOKED, 3/3 sessions revoked.

findings.title: MA-02: Session revocation not wired into removeMember/updateMemberRole
findings.resolution: RESOLVED FULL review. B-2 regression check DELTA-R2: happy-path rotation still PASS.

b1_b2_regression.b1_happy_path: PASS — rotation RT0→RT1 returns 200 + new pair
b1_b2_regression.b1_replay_family_wipe: PASS — replay RT1 → 401 SESSION_REVOKED; DB: 3/3 sessions revoked (rowcount>1). LIVE-PG-2/3 green.
b1_b2_regression.b2_revoke_all: PASS — not regressed; prior proof intact

family_wipe_live: replay RT1 → HTTP 401 SESSION_REVOKED; DB rowcount=3 (>1); LIVE-PG-2 wipeCount>1 under SET ROLE brain_app + set_config
summary: PASS. Both bounced findings resolved and live-proven. SEC-AOF-L1/QA-08: set_config('app.current_user_id',$1,true) at auth.service.ts:411. Replay path returns 401 SESSION_REVOKED (not 500). DB: 3 sessions revoked (rowcount>1). LIVE-PG-1/2/3 all pass against real Postgres under brain_app NOBYPASSRLS role. Unit test is non-inert (asserts set_config string presence and ordering). Zero remaining parameterized SET LOCAL in apps/core/src. SEC-AOF-N1: loginFailKey single-counted (catch only); success resets both keys; 4 fails then correct pwd → 200; trips at 5 failures. All 9 previously-closed findings remain closed. Tenant isolation (P0) preserved. 74/74 tests pass.
